day3_after_start.name: Me
day3_after_start.text: *After school. The school feels strangely quiet today.*

day3_after_riin.name: School Nurse
day3_after_riin.text: "Oh, {name}. Good timing. You look a bit tired today?"

day3_after_riin_2.name: School Nurse
day3_after_riin_2.text: "Sit down here. I made a special health drink — a vitamin and herb blend."

day3_after_riin_3.name: Me
day3_after_riin_3.text: *Riin hands me a cup with a pale purple liquid. ...It smells a little odd.*

day3_after_riin_name.name: School Nurse
day3_after_riin_name.text: "...Hey, {name}. Don't you think we've gotten pretty close by now?"

day3_after_riin_name_2.name: School Nurse
day3_after_riin_name_2.text: "Don't call me 'nurse'... Call me Riin. When it's just the two of us."

day3_after_riin_drink_2.name: Me
day3_after_riin_drink_2.text: *I drank it. ...A bitter aftertaste lingers on my tongue. Wait, my vision is slightly...*

day3_after_riin_drink_3.name: Me
day3_after_riin_drink_3.text: *...No, I'm fine. Just tired, that's all.*

day3_after_riin_refuse_2.name: Riin
day3_after_riin_refuse_2.text: "That's okay, you can drink it next time. ...You will drink it next time, right?"

day3_after_sea.name: Han Sea
day3_after_sea.text: "{name}, let's walk home together. I want to check out the new bakery!"

day3_after_sea_2.name: Me
day3_after_sea_2.text: *Walking down the corridor with Sea. She seems cheerful as usual, but...*

day3_after_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day3_after_sea_3.text: "...By the way, {name}, where did you go during lunch?"

day3_after_sea_4.name: Han Sea
day3_after_sea_4.text: "I heard you were on the rooftop with Yuna. Just the two of you. ...Someone told me."

day3_after_sea_4_alt.name: Han Sea
day3_after_sea_4_alt.text: "You disappeared during lunch... I was a little worried."

day3_after_sea_truth_2.name: Me
day3_after_sea_truth_2.text: *Sea is smiling. She's smiling, but... her eyes aren't.*

day3_after_sea_lie.name: Han Sea
day3_after_sea_lie.text: "Really? Good, I was lonely all by myself!"

day3_after_sea_lie_2.name: Me
day3_after_sea_lie_2.text: *Sea grabbed my arm. Tighter than usual.*

day3_after_eunsu.name: Homeroom Teacher
day3_after_eunsu.text: "Oh, {name}. You're still here? I'm working late too, haha."

day3_after_eunsu_2.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_2.text: *The teacher is buried in a pile of documents. I can see something through the gaps.*

day3_after_eunsu_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day3_after_eunsu_3.text: "Wait just a moment, let me finish this... Oh, want some coffee?"

day3_after_eunsu_name.name: Homeroom Teacher
day3_after_eunsu_name.text: "...{name}. When it's just us, you don't have to call me 'teacher'."

day3_after_eunsu_name_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day3_after_eunsu_name_2.text: "Call me Eunsu. ...Or 'Ms. Eunsu' if that's easier."

day3_after_eunsu_4.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_4.text: *While Ms. Eunsu goes to make coffee. Documents on her desk catch my eye. 'Transfer Student Management Registry'.*

day3_after_eunsu_peek.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_peek.text: *I flipped through the documents. A list of transfer students... with dates beside each name. Transfer date and... 'Processing Completion Date'?*

day3_after_eunsu_peek_2.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_peek_2.text: *My name is here too. The column next to the date is... still blank.*

day3_after_eunsu_ignore_2.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_ignore_2.text: *I chatted with Ms. Eunsu over coffee. It was warm and comfortable. ...Was it really?*

day3_after_alone.name: Me
day3_after_alone.text: *Alone in the classroom. The memory card in my pocket weighs on my mind.*

day3_after_alone_2.name: Me
day3_after_alone_2.text: *I pulled out my laptop and inserted the memory card.*

day3_after_alone_no_card.name: Me
day3_after_alone_no_card.text: *Quiet classroom. Time passed without anything special happening.*

day3_after_alone_branch.name: Me
day3_after_alone_branch.text: *Files appear. Photo folders, document folders... My heart pounds.*

day3_after_alone_3.name: Me
day3_after_alone_3.text: *Photos. Empty classrooms, cleared-out lockers, desks with names scratched off... And photos of documents taken in the faculty office.*

day3_after_alone_yuna_photos.name: Me
day3_after_alone_yuna_photos.text: *...Wait. There's another folder. It's labeled 'Observation Records'.*

day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_2.name: Me
day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_2.text: *I opened it. ...They're photos of me. Dozens of them. Sleeping during class, walking down the hallway from behind, eating lunch from the side...*

day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_3.name: Me
day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_3.text: *...What is this? Yuna took these? This is... stalking, isn't it?*

day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_4.name: Me
day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_4.text: *My heart is pounding. Was Yuna one of them too? Made me trust her, and then...*

day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_5.name: Me
day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_5.text: *...No, wait. Looking more carefully, they're all taken from surveillance camera angles. It's not that Yuna took photos of me — she photographed 'the surveillants photographing me.'*

day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_6.name: Me
day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_6.text: *So this is... evidence that I'm being watched. Material Yuna gathered for my sake.*

day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_7.name: Me
day3_after_alone_yuna_photos_7.text: *...But that fear I felt just now was real. In this school, I don't know who I can trust.*

day3_after_alone_4.name: Me
day3_after_alone_4.text: *A document titled 'Subject List'. Numbers and names in rows... most crossed out in red.*

day3_after_alone_5.name: Me
day3_after_alone_5.text: *The last line. Number 07. My name. The red line... isn't there yet.*

day3_after_alone_6.name: Me
day3_after_alone_6.text: *Footsteps in the corridor. I yanked the card out.*

day3_after_end.name: Me
day3_after_end.text: *Leaving school. The sunset is red. ...Red like blood.*
